title: Cross-engine attribute-based access controls (Beta)
body: External engines can now read Unity Catalog managed tables (Delta and Iceberg) with [attribute-based access controls (ABAC)](/aws/en/data-governance/unity-catalog/abac), row filters, and column masks enforced server-side. See [Cross-engine attribute-based access controls (ABAC)](/aws/en/external-access/cross-engine-abac).
